zh.lifeSummary: 當John Elliot於1485年出生時，他的父親William Eliot36歲，母親Mrs. William Eliott31歲。他於大約1524年與Margaret Shepey在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1557年10月30日在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德享年72歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Elliot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Elliott  .

variants.name: Elliott
meanings: English: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Eliot, a pet form of the Old Testament name Elijah, rendered in Greek as Ēlias and in Old French as Élie + the diminutive suffix -ot; compare Ellis . The name Aylett may in some cases also have been confused with or absorbed into Elliott.

Scottish (of Breton origin): perhaps, as some members of the Elliott clan believe, a Scottish variant of the Breton surname Elleouet, a habitational name from one of the hamlets named Allegot in Finistère.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Elliot was born in 1485, his father, William Eliot, was 36 and his mother, Mrs. William Eliott, was 31. He married Margaret Shepey about 1524, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 30 October 1557, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Elliot est né en 1485, son père, William Eliot, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William Eliott, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Shepey environ 1524, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 30 octobre 1557, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Elliot 1485 geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Eliot 36 und seine Mutter Mrs. William Eliott 31. Er hat um 1524 in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England Margaret Shepey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Oktober 1557 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Elliot è nato il nel 1485, il suo padre, William Eliot, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. William Eliott, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Shepey circa 1524, nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 ottobre 1557, nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Engla: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォード
ja.lifeSummary: John Elliotが1485年に生まれた時，父William Eliotは36歳，母Mrs. William Eliottは31歳であった。約1524年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードでMargaret Shepeyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1557年10月30日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで72歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Elliot(이)가 1485년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Eliot(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William Eliott(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1524년 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 Margaret Shepey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1557년 10월 30일 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Elliot nasceu em 1485, seu pai, William Eliot, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William Eliott, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Shepey aproximadamente 1524, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de outubro de 1557, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Bishops Stortford, Hertfordshire, Englan: Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Elliot родился в 1485 г., его отцу по имени William Eliot было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William Eliott, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Shepey около 1524 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 30 октября 1557 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия.

Se casó con Margaret Shepey aproximadamente 1524, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 30 de octubre de 1557, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
